posts.author: whiteshark
posts.text: narmada gelatine looks good at current level with 15% stake in India gelatine and also they got new japan base owner who bought stake at 310 levels it will get a premium valuation if they get into collagen manuf but fy25 agm they didnt have any plans to expand into it. they have a 8% sales growth target yoy and most of the raw material they import due to low quality of domestic raw materials. rest the company numbers looks too good to ignore but i dont think it cane be a multibagger can views are welcome
